zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois於1287年1月15日出生在法國布格時，她的母親Countess Mathilde d'Artois19歲，父親Otto IV Count of Burgundy39歲。她於1307年與Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1330年1月21日在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆享年43歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois于1287年1月15日出生在法国布格时，她的母亲Countess Mathilde d'Artois19岁，父亲Otto IV Count of Burgundy39岁。她于1307年与Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1330年1月21日在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆享年43岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯。

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois was born on 15 January 1287, in Burgundy, France, her mother, Countess Mathilde d'Artois, was 19 and her father, Otto IV Count of Burgundy, was 39. She married Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre in 1307. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 21 January 1330, in Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 43, and was buried in Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois est née le 15 janvier 1287, à Bourgogne, France, sa mère, Countess Mathilde d'Artois, avait 19 ans et son père, Otto IV Count of Burgundy, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre en 1307. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 janvier 1330, à Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois am 15. Januar 1287 in Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Countess Mathilde d'Artois 19 und ihr Vater Otto IV Count of Burgundy 39. Sie hat 1307 Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Januar 1330 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois è nata il il 15 gennaio 1287 nel Bourgogne, Francia, sua madre, Countess Mathilde d'Artois, aveva 19 anni e sua padre, Otto IV Count of Burgundy, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre nel 1307. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1330, nel Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artoisが1287年1月15日にフランスボウルゴグンで生まれた時，母Countess Mathilde d'Artoisは19歳，父Otto IV Count of Burgundyは39歳であった。1307年にPhilippe V Roi de France et de Navarreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1330年1月21日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメで43歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois(이)가 1287년 1월 15일 프랑스 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Mathilde d'Artois(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 아버지 Otto IV Count of Burgundy(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1307년 Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 1월 21일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.15 January 1287–21 January 1330: 15 de janeiro de 1287–21 de janeiro de 1330
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois nasceu em 15 de janeiro de 1287, em Bourgogne, França, sua mãe, Countess Mathilde d'Artois, tinha 19 anos e seu pai, Otto IV Count of Burgundy, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre em 1307. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1330, em Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois родилась 15 января 1287 г. в местности бургогн, Франция, её матери по имени Countess Mathilde d'Artois было 19 лет, а отцу, которого звали Otto IV Count of Burgundy, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre в 1307 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 21 января 1330 г. в местности сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.15 January 1287–21 January 1330: 15 de enero de 1287–21 de enero de 1330
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne Comtesse Palatin de Bourgogne et d'Artois nació el 15 de enero de 1287, en Bourgogne, Francia, su mamá, Countess Mathilde d'Artois, tenía 19 años y su papá, Otto IV Count of Burgundy, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Philippe V Roi de France et de Navarre en 1307. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1330, en Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
